info.name: BidKhong Auction API
info.description:
Complete API collection for BidKhong online auction platform.
Updated: 25 Mar 2026 — includes Search History, Recommendations, Admin Approval, Slip Verify, Anti-sniping, Seller Rating, Unban.

Total: 61 endpoints across 14 folders.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication

request.description:
Register a new user. Auto-creates wallet with 0 balance.

Required: name, email, password (min 8), phone_number
Rate Limit: 10 req/min

Login with email and password. Returns user object and bearer token.
Rate Limit: 10 req/min
Login as admin. Saves token to admin_token variable for Admin Panel tests.
Get current authenticated user information with wallet.
Update profile info. All fields optional: name, email, phone_number.
Upload or update profile image. Replaces existing image if any. Max 2MB.
Change password. Requires current password and new password (min 8 chars) with confirmation.

Request password reset. Sends OTP 6 digits to email. Token valid for 60 minutes.
Rate Limit: 10 req/min

Reset password using OTP from forgot-password email. All existing sessions will be logged out.
Rate Limit: 10 req/min
Logout and invalidate current token.

item.description:
User authentication & profile management (10 endpoints)
Rate Limit: Auth routes = 10 req/min, Protected = 100 req/min

request.description:
Get all 6 categories with their subcategories (36 total).

Categories: Electronics, Fashion, Collectibles, Home & Living, Vehicles, Others
Get a single category with its subcategories.
Get all subcategories.

item.name: 📦 Products

request.description:
Get all products with pagination.

Query params: ?search=iphone&category_id=1&subcategory_id=2&min_price=1000&max_price=50000&location=Bangkok&status=active&sort=price_asc

Sort options: price_asc, price_desc, newest, ending_soon, most_bids, incoming
Search and filter products. Enable/disable query params as needed.
Get single product with: seller info, bid info (count, highest bidder), images, certificate status, tag (hot/ending/ended/incoming/default), bid_increment, minimum_bid.

formdata.description: Auction duration in days: 1-5 (use this OR auction_end_time)
Exact end time (use this OR duration)
Additional images (optional, max 8 files, each max 5MB)
Certificate file for authenticity (optional, PDF/jpeg/png/jpg, max 10MB). Admin will review.

request.description:
Create a new auction product with optional certificate.

FormData upload. Required: name, starting_price, bid_increment, picture.
Optional: description, buyout_price, duration OR auction_end_time, auction_start_time, category_id, subcategory_id, location, images[], certificate.

If certificate is uploaded, it will be in 'pending' status until admin approves.
Get all products listed by the current user (as seller).
Delete a product. Only product owner can delete. Cannot delete if has active bids.
Delete a single image from a product. Only product owner can delete. Replace '1' with actual image ID.

item.description:
Product management (7 endpoints)
Public: list & detail | Protected: create, delete, my products

request.description:
Place a bid on a product.

Rules:
- price >= current_price + bid_increment
- Cannot bid on own product
- Must have sufficient wallet balance
- Bid amount held in escrow (balance_available → balance_pending)
- Previous highest bidder auto-refunded
Buy product immediately at buyout price. Ends auction, refunds all existing bidders, creates order. Requires sufficient wallet balance.
Get all bids for a specific product, ordered by price DESC.

Get all bids placed by current user with summary (total, winning, outbid, won, lost).
Filter: ?status=winning|outbid|won|lost

item.name: 💰 Wallet

request.description:
⚠️ BREAKING CHANGE: ต้องแนบสลิปแล้ว!

Body (form-data): amount (required, min 1) + slip_image (required, JPEG/PNG/JPG, max 5MB)

Slip2Go API verify → verified = เพิ่มเงิน, rejected = ไม่เพิ่ม
Dev mode: ถ้าไม่มี SLIP2GO_API_KEY → auto approve ทุกสลิป

Withdraw funds from wallet.

Min: 100 Baht
Required: amount, bank_code, account_number (10-15 chars), account_name
Checks: balance_available >= amount

Get wallet transaction history.

Types: topup, withdraw, bid_placed, bid_refund, auction_won, auction_sold, escrow_hold, escrow_release, escrow_refund

item.description: Wallet management: top up, withdraw, transaction history (3 endpoints)

request.description: Get all orders for current user (as buyer or seller).

Manually close auction and create order for winner.
Only product owner can close. Creates order with status pending_buyer_confirm.

Also triggers: notifications to winner/losers/seller, bid status updates.

item.name: 🤝 Post-Auction (Escrow)

request.description:
Get order detail with buyer and seller contact info.
Returns: order info, product, buyer/seller name & phone, my_role (buyer/seller), status timeline.

Buyer confirms order.

Effects:
- Holds escrow from buyer wallet
- Status: pending_buyer_confirm → confirmed
- Sets ship_deadline to 3 days
- Notifies seller

Deadline: 48 hours to confirm, or order auto-cancelled + strike

Seller marks order as shipped.

Effects:
- Status: confirmed → shipped
- Sets receive_deadline to 7 days
- Notifies buyer

Deadline: 3 days to ship, or auto-cancelled + refund + strike

Buyer confirms item received.

Effects:
- Status: shipped → completed
- Releases escrow payment to seller wallet
- Notifies seller

Deadline: 7 days, then auto-complete

formdata.value: Item not as described, received a different product

formdata.description: Evidence images (optional, max 5 files, each max 5MB)

request.description:
Buyer files a dispute.

Only buyer can dispute. Must be in shipped status.
Required: reason. Optional: evidence_images (max 5).
Admin will review and resolve.

item.description:
Post-auction escrow flow: confirm → ship → receive/dispute (5 endpoints)

Status: pending_buyer_confirm → confirmed → shipped → completed/disputed

item.name: 🔔 Notifications

request.description: Get all notifications for current user.
Get only unread notifications for current user.
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read for current user.

item.description:
Notification system (4 endpoints)
Types: outbid, won, lost, sold, new_bid, order, system

item.name: 🚨 Reports

formdata.description: Type: scam, fake_product, harassment, inappropriate_content, other

formdata.value: This product appears to be counterfeit based on the images

formdata.description: Evidence images (optional, max 5 files, each max 5MB)

request.description:
Submit a report against a user/product.

Types: scam, fake_product, harassment, inappropriate_content, other
Cannot report yourself.
Admin will review.
Get all reports submitted by current user with summary counts (pending, reviewing, resolved).
Get detail of a specific report (own reports only). Includes admin reply if any.

item.description: Report system — report users/products for violations (3 endpoints, protected)

item.name: 🔍 Search History

request.description:
🆕 ดูประวัติค้นหาล่าสุด 20 อัน (เรียงตาม updated_at desc)

Auth: Required
ประวัติถูกบันทึกอัตโนมัติเมื่อ search สินค้า (?search=xxx)

🆕 บันทึกคำค้นหาเข้า DB

Auth: Required
Body: { keyword: string (required, max 255) }

ถ้าคำค้นซ้ำ → อัปเดต timestamp ให้ขึ้นบนสุด (ไม่สร้างซ้ำ)

🆕 ลบประวัติค้นหา 1 รายการ

Auth: Required
เปลี่ยน /1 เป็น ID ที่ต้องการลบ

🆕 ลบประวัติค้นหาทั้งหมดของ user

Auth: Required

item.description:
🆕 Search History — บันทึกอัตโนมัติเมื่อ search สินค้า (3 endpoints, protected)
ดูประวัติ / ลบ 1 อัน / ลบทั้งหมด

item.name: ⭐ Reviews

request.description:
⚠️ CHANGED: endpoint เปลี่ยนจาก /orders/{id}/review → /users/{seller_id}/rate

Rate a seller (1-5 stars).

Body:
- rating: 1-5 (required)
- order_id: ID ของ order ที่ต้องการ rate (required)

Rules:
- ต้อง login
- ต้องเป็น buyer ของ order นั้น
- order ต้อง completed
- 1 rating ต่อ 1 order
- ห้าม rate ตัวเอง

Response: review + seller_rating + seller_total_reviews

Get all ratings for a seller (public, no auth required).

Returns:
- summary: average_rating, total_reviews, rating_breakdown (5→1)
- ratings: paginated list with reviewer name + profile_image

item.description:
⭐ Seller Rating system — buyer rates seller 1-5 stars (per order)
POST /users/{seller_id}/rate — rate a seller (ต้อง login + ระบุ order_id)
GET /users/{seller_id}/ratings — ดูคะแนนผู้ขาย (public)

item.name: 🔍 Search History

request.description:
🆕 ดึงประวัติค้นหา 20 อันล่าสุด (เรียงตาม updated_at desc)

Auth: Required

ประวัติถูกบันทึกอัตโนมัติเมื่อ user ค้นหาสินค้าผ่าน GET /products?search=xxx

🆕 ลบประวัติค้นหา 1 อัน

Auth: Required
Param: search history ID

🆕 ลบประวัติค้นหาทั้งหมด (clear all)

Auth: Required
Returns: deleted_count

item.description:
🆕 Search History — บันทึกอัตโนมัติเมื่อค้นหาสินค้า
3 endpoints: ดูประวัติ, ลบ 1 อัน, ลบทั้งหมด

item.name: 🤖 Recommendations (AI)

request.description:
🆕 AI แนะนำสินค้าเฉพาะ user จาก bidding history (LightFM)

Auth: Required (ใช้ user token)
Query: limit (default 10)

Response: { source: 'lightfm'|'popular'|'fallback_popular', products: [...] }

Fallback: ถ้า AI service ล่ม → ส่งสินค้ายอดนิยมแทนอัตโนมัติ

⚠️ ต้อง train model ก่อน: curl -X POST http://localhost:5001/train

🆕 สินค้าที่คล้ายกัน (ไม่ต้อง login)

Auth: Not required
Query: limit (default 10)

Response: { source: 'lightfm_similarity'|'fallback_category', products: [...] }

Fallback: ถ้า AI service ล่ม → ส่งสินค้า category เดียวกันแทน

item.description:
🆕 AI Recommendation system (LightFM) — 2 endpoints
Personalized recommendations + Similar products
Fallback to popular/category-based when AI unavailable

item.name: 🛡 Admin Panel

request.description: Get admin dashboard statistics: total users, products, orders, revenue, pending reports/disputes/certificates.
Get all user reports for admin review. Filter by ?status=pending|reviewing|resolved|dismissed

Update report status and add admin note.
Status: pending → reviewing → resolved/dismissed
Get all users with wallet info and strike counts.
Get detailed user info: profile, wallet, products, orders, strikes, reports.

Ban a user for specified number of days. Creates a user_strike record.
Required: reason, duration_days

Get all product certificates for admin review.
Filter: ?status=pending|approved|rejected

Includes: product info, seller info, file path.
View or download the certificate file (PDF/image) for review.

Approve or reject a product certificate.

Required: status (approved/rejected)
Optional: admin_note

Approved → product gets 'Certified ✅' badge (is_certified accessor)
Seller receives notification either way.

🆕 ดูสินค้ารออนุมัติ (default: pending)

Query: status=pending|rejected

Includes: user, category, subcategory, images, certificate, bids_count

สินค้าใหม่ทุกชิ้น = status pending → admin ต้อง approve ก่อนถึงจะแสดงใน public

🆕 อนุมัติสินค้า → status เปลี่ยนเป็น active

Only works on 'pending' products
Seller receives notification: สินค้าได้รับการอนุมัติแล้ว

🆕 ปฏิเสธสินค้า → status เปลี่ยนเป็น rejected

Required: admin_note (เหตุผลที่ปฏิเสธ, max 1000 chars)
Only works on 'pending' products
Seller receives notification with rejection reason

🆕 ปลดแบน user

Sets all active strikes' banned_until = now()
User receives notification: บัญชีถูกปลดแบนแล้ว

Returns 422 if user is not currently banned

item.description:
Admin panel — requires admin role (13 endpoints)

🆕 New: Product Approval (3), Unban (1)

Login as admin first, then use admin_token.
Default admin: admin@bidkhong.com / admin123
